"def organize_medieval_items(items):  
    categorized = {}  
    for item in items:  
        first_letter = item[0].lower()  
        if first_letter not in categorized:  
            categorized[first_letter] = []  
        categorized[first_letter].append(item)  
    for key in categorized:  
        categorized[key].sort()  
    return categorized  

print(organize_medieval_items([\"dragon\", \"castle\", \"sword\", \"shield\", \"dagger\", \"crown\"]))"
